entry.title: Entry #26 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: ORDER granting 24 Motion for Admission Pro Hac Vice of Attorney G. Lynn Shumway for Benjamin Nathan Blaine, G. Lynn Shumway for Deven Grant Blaine, G. Lynn Shumway for Nathan A. Blaine, G. Lynn Shumway for Douglas Leavitt, G. Lynn Shumway for Tracy Leavitt.Attorneys admitted Pro Hac Vice must register to efile and receive electronic notification of case activity in the District of Utah at https://www.pacer.uscourts.gov/cmecf/dcbk.html. Instructions are available at https://www.utd.uscourts.gov/cmecf-electronic-case-filing.A Pro Hac Vice Attorney who fails to register for CM/ECF access will not receive notifications of electronic filings.Attorneys admitted Pro Hac Vice may download a copy of the District of Utahs local rules from the courts web site at https://www.utd.uscourts.gov/rules-practice. Signed by Magistrate Judge Daphne A. Oberg on 01/12/2026. (kpf) (Entered: 01/12/2026)

Blaine Motions referred to Daphne A. Oberg. Signed by District Judge Ann Marie McIff Allen on 1/12/2025. (pjd) (Entered: 01/12/2026)

entry.title: Entry #24 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: Plaintiff's MOTION for Admission Pro Hac Vice of Gary Lynn Shumway, Registration fee $ 50, receipt number AUTDC-5655631,Attorneys awaiting Pro Hac Vice admission should immediately register to efile and receive electronic notification of case activity in the District of Utah at https://www.pacer.uscourts.gov/cmecf/dcbk.html.Registration requests will not be approved until the court has granted the pro hac vice motion. Instructions are available on the court's website at https://www.utd.uscourts.gov/cmecf-electronic-case-filing. filed by Plaintiffs Benjamin Nathan Blaine, Deven Grant Blaine, Nathan A. Blaine, Douglas Leavitt, Tracy Leavitt. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit, # 2 Text of Proposed Order)(Halliday, Paul) (Entered: 01/10/2026)

entry.title: Entry #23 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: ANSWER to Complaint (Notice of Removal 1 ) with Jury Demand filed by Tesla of UT, Inc., Tesla, Inc.. (Brown, Kamie) (Entered: 01/09/2026)

entry.title: Entry #22 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: DOCKET TEXT ORDER denying without prejudice 17 Plaintiff's Motion for Admission Pro Hac Vice of G. Lynn Shumway. Local Rule DUCivR 83-1.1(c)(2) requires an applicant for pro hac vice admission to associate with local counsel, and local counsel must file the motion for pro hac vice admission and consent to serve as local counsel. The 17 motion for admission is not signed by the attorney listed as local counsel; instead, it is signed by the applicant. Accordingly, the motion is denied without prejudice. A renewed motion signed by local counsel may be filed in accordance with the requirements of DUCivR 83-1.1(c)(2). Signed by Magistrate Judge Daphne A. Oberg on 1/6/2026. No attached document. (med) (Entered: 01/06/2026)

entry.title: Entry #21 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: DOCKET TEXT ORDER granting 20 Defendants' Motion for Extension of Time to Answer. Defendants' deadline to answer or otherwise respond to the complaint is extended to January 9, 2026. Signed by Magistrate Judge Daphne A. Oberg on 1/6/2026. No attached document. (med) (Entered: 01/06/2026)

entry.title: Entry #17 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: Plaintiff's MOTION for Admission Pro Hac Vice of G. Lynn Shumway, Registration fee $ 50, receipt number AUTDC-5655631,Attorneys awaiting Pro Hac Vice admission should immediately register to efile and receive electronic notification of case activity in the District of Utah at https://www.pacer.uscourts.gov/cmecf/dcbk.html.Registration requests will not be approved until the court has granted the pro hac vice motion. Instructions are available on the court's website at https://www.utd.uscourts.gov/cmecf-electronic-case-filing. filed by Plaintiffs Benjamin Nathan Blaine, Deven Grant Blaine, Nathan A. Blaine, Douglas Leavitt, Tracy Leavitt. (Attachments: # 1 Text of Proposed Order, # 2 Exhibit)(Halliday, Paul) (Entered: 01/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #16 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
entry.summary: ORDER OF RECUSAL. Magistrate Judge Jared C. Bennett recused. Case reassigned to Magistrate Judge Daphne A. Oberg for all further proceedings. Signed by Magistrate Judge Jared C. Bennett on 12/31/2025. (kpf) (Entered: 12/31/2025)

entry.title: Entry #14 in Blaine v. Tesla, Inc, 2:25-cv-01161
